download_policy.repository_policy: Store model IDs, runner hints, and links only. Do not commit downloaded Hugging Face weights, private DICOM, private NIfTI, masks, meshes, or derived private outputs.
download_policy.runtime_policy: Download and run models only in a private GPU/runtime environment after license, input format, and validation checks.
download_policy.clinical_policy: Every model result is a research aid and must be reviewed by a qualified clinician. It is not an automatic diagnosis.

stacks.title: Brain MRI private 3D analysis stack
stacks.summary: Primary private pipeline for brain extraction, tumor/target segmentation, volume measurement, and mesh generation.

models.name: HD-BET
models.note: Use before tumor segmentation so later steps analyze the brain region only.

models.name: nnU-Net v2
models.note: Best default for a validated private segmentation model; requires task-specific trained weights.

models.name: Marching Cubes + trimesh/scikit-image
models.note: This is geometry processing, not diagnosis AI.

stacks.title: Hugging Face brain MRI candidates
stacks.summary: Candidate models to evaluate or fine-tune for brain MRI segmentation/masking. Keep them behind private validation.

models.name: MONAI BraTS MRI Segmentation
models.input: brain MRI volume, expected format must be verified
models.runner_hint: Load with MONAI/Hugging Face after checking card instructions.
models.note: Use as a candidate only; verify license, modalities, preprocessing, and performance on your private data.

models.name: MedSAM ViT-Base
models.runner_hint: Use for clinician-guided ROI/mask assistance, not fully automatic diagnosis.
models.note: Good for UI-assisted masking experiments; not a replacement for validated 3D segmentation.

models.name: 3D MRI Brain Tumor Segmentation
models.input: 3D MRI, exact preprocessing must be verified
models.runner_hint: Treat as a community candidate and validate before use.
models.note: Do not expose as clinical diagnosis without full validation.

stacks.title: Lumbar spine MRI review candidates
stacks.summary: Lumbar pipeline candidates for structure review. The app must avoid disc/stenosis/nerve-compression diagnosis wording.

models.name: TotalSegmentator MRI
models.note: Use for structure review experiments only after verifying MRI task coverage and labels.

models.name: Lumbar Spine Degenerative Classification
models.input: lumbar MRI image, exact format must be verified
models.runner_hint: Use only as a research/fine-tuning candidate; keep UI wording as review/reference.
models.note: Do not present outputs as disc diagnosis, stenosis diagnosis, or nerve compression diagnosis.

models.name: MedSAM ViT-Base
models.runner_hint: Use for manual ROI assistance in private review screens.
models.note: Needs local validation and clinician review.

stacks.title: Public Kaggle/demo fine-tuning candidates
stacks.summary: 2D JPG/PNG public demo candidates. These are not used for private 3D volume measurement.

models.name: Brain Tumor Detection MRI
models.runner_hint: Use only for public demo/fine-tuning experiments.
models.note: Not for 3D volume calculation and not for diagnosis.

models.name: Brain MRI Tumor Classification
models.runner_hint: Use only after checking model card and license.

models.name: UNet Brain Tumor Segmentation MRI
models.runner_hint: Use for public mask overlay/fine-tuning experiments.
models.note: Do not use Kaggle JPG/PNG masks for 3D volume measurement.
